case_title: TREMAIN, THEA et al VS GARICOITZ, LEON

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS CORRECTED ADDING TWO PLTF'S ERRONEOUSLY OMITTED IN THE FIRST CLAIM. SEE ORIGINAL CLAIM FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-16-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-14-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROOF OF DEFT'S PAYMENT TO PLTFS. IF DEFT HAS FAILED TO PAY TIMELY, BAD FAITH STATUTORY DAMAGES OF $500 PER CCP 1950.5 (L) ARE AWARDED IN ADDITION TO THE ABOVE PRINCIPAL AMOUNT ($1500).
PLTF STATEMENT RE: PYMT OF MONEY FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL SENT TO LEON GARICOITZ RETURNED SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARICOITZ, LEON DEFENDANT CAME TO COURT & SHOWED PROOF OF PAYMENT TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY TREMAIN, THEA KAPADIA, SHYAMAL NOWAK, JEFF AS TO DEFENDANT GARICOITZ, LEON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
